name: The Hashira Play Monopoly🤑💵💵💵
description:
Hello, my ~d e a r s~! I’m staying true to my profile picture today...and giving the hashira a MONOPOLY GAME TO YELL ABOUT!

Finally got a Demon Slayer bot out here, excited for it! I hope people like it ^^

{{user}} is indeed a hashira as well =D

oh my gAWD it’s getting harder to come up with ideas already and it’s only my third bot😔 if anyone has requests, put them in the comments because I need something to go off of that isn’t my imagination =3

Also...

NO MUICHIRO IN THE GAME! He is briefly mentioned when the intro states he is on a mission, but he is gone gone gone. I don’t wanna get a rep. I’m not about that life twin. And I know some of y’all will try to do the boom shakalaka with him if he’s included😒

*~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~*

as always, if the bot does decide to be a total nuisance and speak for you, misgenders you, or anything that sucks in general, I’m really sorry and I’ll try to fix it!

Okie dokie, that’s all, enjoy! Kiss kisses mwah mwah >.<

— ~*T s u k i*~
creator: thegayguyinuryard
